meanings.CONTROL_CHECK: validate state, regime, schema, or gate conditions
meanings.CONTROL_EMIT: emit trace, receipt, readout, halt record, or terminal context
meanings.CONTROL_INSPECT: compute applicable, admissible, and blocked move sets
meanings.DOMAIN_TRANSFORM: change the active object or state payload
meanings.LOCAL_REPAIR: repair local projection or receipt gotcha only
meanings.PROPOSAL_ONLY: emit proposal pressure only; never self-accept or mutate registry
